resources.string: The rusted throne accepts another decree from a fractured memory
RUSTED THRONE ACCEPTS A DECREE FROM BROKEN MEMORY.

The skeletal metal phalanxes stand mute while the nobles argue over a border that vanished before the aeonic sleep. Alloy cloaks hang splendid and stiff from bodies that cannot feel their weight. The overlord repeats an honorific to a courtier whose self was erased in the transfer, and the council records unanimous consent. Immortal machinery preserves the dynasty perfectly, save for the minds already rotting inside it.
MUTE METAL PHALANXES STAND. NOBLES ARGUE OVER VANISHED BORDERS. BROKEN MEMORY SIGNS THE DECREE. IMMORTAL MACHINERY PRESERVES A MIND ALREADY ROTTING.
